kpi_notes_im.kpi_01: 所選期間內記錄的事件總數。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_02: 所有事件中已解決（已完成狀態）的百分比。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_03: 仍處於未結或待處理狀態（尚未完成或取消）的事件的百分比。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_04: 目前處於未結或待處理狀態的事件數量。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_05: 已撤回或取消的事件數量。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_06: 標記有VIP代碼的事件的占比。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_08: 屬於重複房間＋類別＋項目組合的事件的占比。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_09: 事件建立到首次調查更新之間的平均分鐘數。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_10: 加權平均嚴重程度。低=1，中=2，高=3，嚴重=4。

kpi_notes_co.co_total_orders: 所選期間的清潔工單總數。
kpi_notes_co.co_completed_orders: 所選期間達到已完成狀態的清潔工單。
kpi_notes_co.co_completion_rate: 所選期間已完成清潔工單的占比。
kpi_notes_co.co_avg_duration: 已完成清潔工單的平均完成時長。
kpi_notes_co.co_median_duration: 已完成清潔工單的中位完成時長。
kpi_notes_co.co_on_time_rate: 已完成工單中按時完成的占比。
kpi_notes_co.co_delayed_orders: 已完成但超時的工單數量。
kpi_notes_co.co_reclean_rate: 被標記為返工的清潔工單占比。
kpi_notes_co.co_inspection_pass_rate: 通過質檢的已檢工單占比。
kpi_notes_co.co_productivity_score: 每工時產生的清潔積分。

hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_01: 所選範圍內的事件總案件數。良好：服務品質穩定且數值較低；不良：無需求增長背景下的持續增長超過前期的15%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_02: 人員配置與排隊規劃的營運工作負載基線。良好：可預測的數量且結案品質穩定；不良：超過計畫容量的波動峰值。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_03: 在SLA規範規則內解決的事件的比例。良好 >= 95%；關注 90-94.9%；不良 < 90%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_04: 衡量活躍佇列中的乾淨結案品質。良好 >= 95%；關注 90-94.9%；不良 < 90%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_05: 事件後將服務回復正常狀態的有效性。良好 >= 95%；關注 90-94.9%；不良 < 90%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_06: 執行健康狀況的標準結案吞吐量KPI。良好 >= 95%；關注 90-94.9%；不良 < 90%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_07: 表明嚴重故障暴露的嚴重級別事件占比。良好 <= 1%；關注 1-2%；不良 > 2%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_08: 所有事件案件的平均嚴重度強度。良好 <= 1.8；關注 1.81-2.4；不良 > 2.4。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_09: VIP影響事件的解決品質。良好 >= 95%；關注 90-94.9%；不良 < 90%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_10: 品牌保護監控的高端賓客事件暴露度。良好 <= 6%；關注 6-10%；不良 > 10%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_11: 跨儀表板版本趨勢連續性的相容舊版VIP風險占比。良好 <= 6%；關注 6-10%；不良 > 10%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_12: 集中於最高部門的程度；高集中度意味著瓶頸風險。良好 <= 30%；關注 30-45%；不良 > 45%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_13: 與未解決根本原因相關的復發熱點指標。良好 <= 15%；關注 15-25%；不良 > 25%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_14: 用於與歷史報告基線進行縱向比較的重複負載占比。良好 <= 15%；關注 15-25%；不良 > 25%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_15: 用於優先改善管道的最高投訴來源集中度。良好 <= 35%；關注 35-50%；不良 > 50%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_16: 目前未解決的未結工作負載壓力。良好 <= 5%；關注 5-10%；不良 > 10%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_17: 目前需要積極跟進處理的未解決佇列大小。良好：穩定在接近零的水準；不良：持續多天/多週增長。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_18: 用於排班與人員配置的高峰時段負載標記。良好：每小時模式均衡；不良：與人員配置不一致的單一小時急劇峰值。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_19: 從案件建立到首次調查更新的平均回應延遲。良好 <= 30分鐘；關注 31-60分鐘；不良 > 60分鐘。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_20: 用於監控流程洩漏的已取消案件數量。良好 <= 2%；關注 2-5%；不良 > 事件總量的5%。

hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_03: (總案件數 - SLA違規案件數) / 總案件數 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_04: 已完成案件數 / (已完成案件數 + 待處理案件數) * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_05: 已完成案件數 / 總案件數 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_06: 已完成案件數 / 總案件數 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_07: 嚴重案件數 / 總案件數 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_08: 嚴重度評分總和 / 總案件數 (低=1, 中=2, 高=3, 嚴重=4)
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_09: VIP已完成案件數 / VIP案件數 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_12: 最高部門案件數 / 總案件數 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_13: 重複事件案件數 / 總案件數 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_14: 重複事件案件數 / 總案件數 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_15: 最高投訴來源案件數 / 總案件數 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_16: 待處理案件數 / 總案件數 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_18: 高峰小時 = ARGMAX(小時事件數)
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_19: AVG(首次調查時間戳 - 建立時間戳) 單位：分鐘

kpi_notes_jo.kpi_03: 在SLA內完成的工單百分比。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_04: 以逾時告終的工單百分比。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_05: 升級處理請求干預的工單占比。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_06: 跨團隊重新指派的工單占比。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_07: 從建立到確認的平均分鐘數。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_08: 回應時間的第90百分位數。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_09: 從建立到完成的平均分鐘數。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_10: 所有工單的總需求數量。

kpi_notes_mo.kpi_01: 所選範圍內的維修工單總數。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_02: 成功完成的維修工單百分比。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_03: 仍處於未結狀態的維修工單百分比。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_04: 已取消的維修工單百分比。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_05: 標記為賓客相關的維修工單占比。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_06: 所有維修工單的平均嚴重度代理值。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_07: 最大維修類別所占的份額。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_08: 範圍內活躍的不同維修類別的數量。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_09: 涉及的不同缺陷或資產組合的數量。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_10: 所選期間內的日均維修工單量。

corp_kpi_notes.kpi_01: 綜合企業健康指數，平衡嚴重度、VIP暴露度與SLA違規風險。基準：良好 >= 85，關注 70-84.9，不良 < 70。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_02: 分類為嚴重級別的事件的占比。基準：良好 <= 1%，關注 1-2%，不良 > 2%。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_03: 用於公平連鎖級別比較的跨酒店平均基準指數。基準：良好 >= 85，關注 75-84.9，不良 < 75。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_04: 涉及VIP賓客的事件的比例；追蹤高端服務風險。基準：良好 <= 6%，關注 6-10%，不良 > 10%。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_05: 基於違規/延遲/逾期近似狀態的營運紀律KPI。基準：良好 <= 3%，關注 3-5%，不良 > 5%。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_06: 已達到完成/結案狀態的事件的百分比。基準：良好 >= 95%，關注 90-94.9%，不良 < 90%。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_07: VIP事件的解決效率。基準：良好 >= 95%，關注 90-94.9%，不良 < 90%。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_08: 與忠誠度/留存風險相關的復發壓力指標。基準：良好 <= 15%，關注 15-25%，不良 > 25%。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_09: 所選期間內的事件總數。基準：良好 <= 800，關注 801-1200，不良 > 1200（閾值應根據物業規模進行調整）。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_10: 前5大類別中事件量的集中程度；較高則表示系統性集中風險。基準：良好 <= 45%，關注 45-60%，不良 > 60%。

corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_02: 嚴重案件數 / 總案件數 * 100
corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_03: 各酒店平均 [100 - (嚴重度*40 + VIP*30 + SLA*30)]
corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_05: SLA違規案件數 / 總案件數 * 100
corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_06: 已完成案件數 / 總案件數 * 100
corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_07: VIP已完成案件數 / VIP案件數 * 100
corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_08: 重複投訴案件數 / 總案件數 * 100
corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_10: 前5大事件類別案件數 / 總案件數 * 100

chart_notes_jo.hjo01: 動畫累計每週環形競賽圖，展示各服務類別的長期份額變化。影響：持續的累計優勢揭示了結構性需求壓力點。對策：針對累計增長持續的類別，重新平衡產能計畫、庫存與預防措施。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across categories with stable weekly shares; Warning: one category's cumulative share climbing every week (structural demand pressure).
chart_notes_jo.cjo01: 動畫累計每週環形競賽圖，展示各服務類別的長期份額變化。影響：持續的累計優勢揭示了結構性需求壓力點。對策：針對累計增長持續的類別，重新平衡產能計畫、庫存與預防措施。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across categories with stable weekly shares; Warning: one category's cumulative share climbing every week (structural demand pressure).
chart_notes_jo.hjo02: 按週升冪排列的工作負載長條圖與SLA合規率折線。 Benchmark — Good: SLA compliance ≥ 95%; Watch: 85–95%; Bad: < 85%, especially when SLA dips on high-volume weeks.
chart_notes_jo.cjo02: 按週升冪排列的工作負載長條圖與SLA合規率折線。 Benchmark — Good: SLA compliance ≥ 95%; Watch: 85–95%; Bad: < 85%, especially when SLA dips on high-volume weeks.
chart_notes_jo.hjo03: 按週升冪排列的工作負載長條圖與結案率折線。 Benchmark — Good: closing rate ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: < 75% or falling while volume rises (backlog building).
chart_notes_jo.cjo03: 按週升冪排列的工作負載長條圖與結案率折線。 Benchmark — Good: closing rate ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: < 75% or falling while volume rises (backlog building).
chart_notes_jo.hjo04: 點擊狀態切片可下鑽檢視服務類別構成。 Benchmark — Healthy: Open + Pending < 15% of jobs; Warning: a large Open/Pending slice concentrated in one service category.
chart_notes_jo.cjo04: 點擊狀態切片可下鑽檢視服務類別構成。 Benchmark — Healthy: Open + Pending < 15% of jobs; Warning: a large Open/Pending slice concentrated in one service category.
chart_notes_jo.hjo05: 點擊服務類別切片可下鑽檢視數量最高的服務項目。 Benchmark — Healthy: no single item dominates a category; Warning: one item is a large share of a high-volume category (recurring strain).
chart_notes_jo.cjo05: 點擊服務類別切片可下鑽檢視數量最高的服務項目。 Benchmark — Healthy: no single item dominates a category; Warning: one item is a large share of a high-volume category (recurring strain).
chart_notes_jo.hjo06: 按週升冪的工作負載（長條）與結案效率（折線）。影響：工單上升而結案率下降表明積壓風險。對策：增加短期產能，優先處理積壓工單，並強制執行每日結案目標直至比率穩定。 Benchmark — Good: close rate ≥ 90% and stable as volume rises; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: close rate falling while weekly volume climbs.
chart_notes_jo.cjo06: 按週升冪的工作負載（長條）與結案效率（折線）。影響：工單上升而結案率下降表明積壓風險。對策：增加短期產能，優先處理積壓工單，並強制執行每日結案目標直至比率穩定。 Benchmark — Good: close rate ≥ 90% and stable as volume rises; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: close rate falling while weekly volume climbs.
chart_notes_jo.hjo07: 按週升冪比較每週收件量與SLA表現。影響：高量週的SLA下降揭示了流程瓶頸。對策：部署應急方案，收緊交接SLA，每小時監控易違規佇列。 Benchmark — Good: SLA ≥ 95% held through peak weeks; Watch: 85–95%; Bad: SLA < 85% or dropping on surge weeks.
chart_notes_jo.cjo07: 按週升冪比較每週收件量與SLA表現。影響：高量週的SLA下降揭示了流程瓶頸。對策：部署應急方案，收緊交接SLA，每小時監控易違規佇列。 Benchmark — Good: SLA ≥ 95% held through peak weeks; Watch: 85–95%; Bad: SLA < 85% or dropping on surge weeks.
chart_notes_jo.hjo08: 每週逾時量趨勢，用於及早發現服務中斷。影響：逾時激增會降低賓客滿意度並增加重複聯繫。對策：確定根本原因週，修復路由/升級延遲，並設定逾時激增的警報閾值。 Benchmark — Healthy: flat or falling timeout count near zero; Warning: any upward timeout spike week-over-week.
chart_notes_jo.cjo08: 每週逾時量趨勢，用於及早發現服務中斷。影響：逾時激增會降低賓客滿意度並增加重複聯繫。對策：確定根本原因週，修復路由/升級延遲，並設定逾時激增的警報閾值。 Benchmark — Healthy: flat or falling timeout count near zero; Warning: any upward timeout spike week-over-week.
chart_notes_jo.hjo09: 前10部門依狀態構成的縱向堆疊視圖。影響：特定部門的高未結/待處理占比表明佇列擁堵。對策：重新分配工單，清除阻塞因素，並設定部門級在製品限制並每日評審。 Benchmark — Healthy: Open + Pending < 15% per department; Warning: a department above 30% Open/Pending (queue congestion).
chart_notes_jo.cjo09: 前10部門依狀態構成的縱向堆疊視圖。影響：特定部門的高未結/待處理占比表明佇列擁堵。對策：重新分配工單，清除阻塞因素，並設定部門級在製品限制並每日評審。 Benchmark — Healthy: Open + Pending < 15% per department; Warning: a department above 30% Open/Pending (queue congestion).
chart_notes_jo.hjo10: 依前N類別顯示需求（長條）和結案率（折線）。影響：高量/低結案類別是關鍵績效差距。對策：指定類別負責人，建立操作手冊，並按週追蹤各類別結案率恢復情況。 Benchmark — Good: high-volume categories close ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: a high-volume category closing < 75% (critical gap).
chart_notes_jo.cjo10: 依前N類別顯示需求（長條）和結案率（折線）。影響：高量/低結案類別是關鍵績效差距。對策：指定類別負責人，建立操作手冊，並按週追蹤各類別結案率恢復情況。 Benchmark — Good: high-volume categories close ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: a high-volume category closing < 75% (critical gap).
chart_notes_jo.hjo11: 排名最高需求的服務項目。影響：項目集中可能造成持續營運壓力。對策：將常見任務打包，自動化重複步驟，並為主要項目預先分配資源。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand split across many items; Warning: the top item exceeds ~20% of all jobs or shows a sharp daily spike.
chart_notes_jo.cjo11: 排名最高需求的服務項目。影響：項目集中可能造成持續營運壓力。對策：將常見任務打包，自動化重複步驟，並為主要項目預先分配資源。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand split across many items; Warning: the top item exceeds ~20% of all jobs or shows a sharp daily spike.
chart_notes_jo.hjo12: 顯示接收最高指派負載的部門。影響：負載不均可能導致回應延遲與職業倦怠。對策：重新平衡派單規則並交叉培訓團隊以吸收峰值。 Benchmark — Healthy: assignment load balanced across departments; Warning: one department above ~30% of assignments (overload / burnout risk).
chart_notes_jo.cjo12: 顯示接收最高指派負載的部門。影響：負載不均可能導致回應延遲與職業倦怠。對策：重新平衡派單規則並交叉培訓團隊以吸收峰值。 Benchmark — Healthy: assignment load balanced across departments; Warning: one department above ~30% of assignments (overload / burnout risk).
chart_notes_jo.hjo13: 顯示產生最多工單的請求發起部門。影響：大量需求源可能表明上游流程存在缺口。對策：與來源部門共同執行預防措施以減少可避免的請求。 Benchmark — Healthy: requests spread across source departments; Warning: one source department dominates (upstream process gap).
chart_notes_jo.cjo13: 顯示產生最多工單的請求發起部門。影響：大量需求源可能表明上游流程存在缺口。對策：與來源部門共同執行預防措施以減少可避免的請求。 Benchmark — Healthy: requests spread across source departments; Warning: one source department dominates (upstream process gap).
chart_notes_jo.hjo14: 顯示完成最多工單的部門。影響：相對於指派份額的低完成份額可能表明執行瓶頸。對策：比較指派與完成構成並消除完成阻礙。 Benchmark — Healthy: completion share ≈ assignment share per department; Warning: completion share well below assignment share (execution bottleneck).
chart_notes_jo.cjo14: 顯示完成最多工單的部門。影響：相對於指派份額的低完成份額可能表明執行瓶頸。對策：比較指派與完成構成並消除完成阻礙。 Benchmark — Healthy: completion share ≈ assignment share per department; Warning: completion share well below assignment share (execution bottleneck).
chart_notes_jo.hjo15: 突顯工單需求最大的位置。影響：熱點若不管理會降低現場服務品質。對策：部署針對位置的人員、庫存與預防性維護措施。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across locations; Warning: one location is a clear hotspot needing dedicated staffing or preventive action.
chart_notes_jo.cjo15: 突顯工單需求最大的位置。影響：熱點若不管理會降低現場服務品質。對策：部署針對位置的人員、庫存與預防性維護措施。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across locations; Warning: one location is a clear hotspot needing dedicated staffing or preventive action.
chart_notes_jo.hjo16: 依部門的升級集中度，用於識別流程壓力點。 Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5% of jobs; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10%, especially concentrated in one department.
chart_notes_jo.cjo16: 依部門的升級集中度，用於識別流程壓力點。 Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5% of jobs; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10%, especially concentrated in one department.
chart_notes_jo.hjo17: 依部門的重新指派集中度，用於識別路由低效。 Benchmark — Good: reassignment ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–15%; Bad: > 15% (routing / triage inaccuracy).
chart_notes_jo.cjo17: 依部門的重新指派集中度，用於識別路由低效。 Benchmark — Good: reassignment ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–15%; Bad: > 15% (routing / triage inaccuracy).
chart_notes_jo.hjo18: 依類別的總違規分鐘數集中度，含項目下鑽。影響：違規分鐘集中可識別SLA風險在財務與聲譽上最高的領域。對策：優先對慢性違規項目進行流程重新設計與升級治理。 Benchmark — Healthy: breach minutes near zero and evenly low; Warning: minutes concentrated in a few categories (highest SLA and financial risk).
chart_notes_jo.cjo18: 依類別的總違規分鐘數集中度，含項目下鑽。影響：違規分鐘集中可識別SLA風險在財務與聲譽上最高的領域。對策：優先對慢性違規項目進行流程重新設計與升級治理。 Benchmark — Healthy: breach minutes near zero and evenly low; Warning: minutes concentrated in a few categories (highest SLA and financial risk).
chart_notes_jo.hjo19: 依類別的升級集中度；點擊檢視項目級問題領域。影響：高升級率表明服務不穩定或權責不清。對策：加強一線決策權，更新操作手冊，明確升級觸發條件。 Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10% concentrated in specific categories.
chart_notes_jo.cjo19: 依類別的升級集中度；點擊檢視項目級問題領域。影響：高升級率表明服務不穩定或權責不清。對策：加強一線決策權，更新操作手冊，明確升級觸發條件。 Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10% concentrated in specific categories.
chart_notes_jo.hjo20: 重新指派的最高部門。影響：頻繁重新指派會增加週期時間與問責缺口。對策：改進指派準確性規則、技能映射與接收時的分類品質。 Benchmark — Good: reassignment ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–15%; Bad: > 15% (accountability gaps and added cycle time).
chart_notes_jo.cjo20: 重新指派的最高部門。影響：頻繁重新指派會增加週期時間與問責缺口。對策：改進指派準確性規則、技能映射與接收時的分類品質。 Benchmark — Good: reassignment ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–15%; Bad: > 15% (accountability gaps and added cycle time).
chart_notes_jo.hjo21: 依部門的解決時長概況，用於識別長尾執行延遲。 Benchmark — Good: median resolution ≤ 30 min; Watch: 30–60 min; Bad: > 60 min or a long right tail in one department.
chart_notes_jo.cjo21: 依部門的解決時長概況，用於識別長尾執行延遲。 Benchmark — Good: median resolution ≤ 30 min; Watch: 30–60 min; Bad: > 60 min or a long right tail in one department.
chart_notes_jo.hjo22: P90解決時間展示依類別與項目的最差情況完成表現。影響：尾部解決延遲會導致投訴與SLA處罰。對策：針對根本原因項目制定專項復原計畫與更嚴格的完成SLA。 Benchmark — Good: P90 resolution ≤ 60 min; Watch: 60–120 min; Bad: > 120 min (worst-case completions driving complaints).
chart_notes_jo.cjo22: P90解決時間展示依類別與項目的最差情況完成表現。影響：尾部解決延遲會導致投訴與SLA處罰。對策：針對根本原因項目制定專項復原計畫與更嚴格的完成SLA。 Benchmark — Good: P90 resolution ≤ 60 min; Watch: 60–120 min; Bad: > 120 min (worst-case completions driving complaints).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-22: Drills from hotel into department, then a rank-grouped service-item range, down to individual items, showing Total Order, Response Time, Average Completion Duration, and Delay Rate together. Benchmark — Good when Delay Rate <= 15% and Response Time <= 15 min; Bad when Delay Rate > 30% or Response Time > 30 min.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-01: Outer donut shows total JO volume by hotel. Click a hotel to see its departments, then a department to see a rank-grouped range of its service items, then a range to see individual items with Total Order, Response Time, Average Completion Duration, and Delay Rate together. Benchmark — Good when Delay Rate <= 15% and Response Time <= 15 min; Bad when Delay Rate > 30% or Response Time > 30 min.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-02: 柱狀圖顯示各酒店工單總量。點擊酒店可檢視各服務類別的升級率(%)，再點擊類別可檢視各服務項目的升級率(%)。 Benchmark — Good: category/item escalation rate ≤ 10%; Watch: 10–25%; Bad: > 25% concentrated in one category or item (systemic escalation driver).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-03: 柱狀圖顯示各酒店工單總量。點擊酒店可下鑽至其24小時分佈，再點擊某一時段可查看該時段前10服務項目。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across hours; Warning: extreme peak hours driving concentrated item demand.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-04: Delayed jobs (delay > 0) by hotel, drilling into duration bucket, then assigned department, then assigned user. Benchmark — Healthy: delayed jobs concentrated in shorter buckets (< 30 min); Warning: high volume in the 4h+/8h+ buckets under a single department or user.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-05: 點擊服務類別切片可下鑽檢視數量最高的服務項目。 Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5% per hotel; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10% at any hotel.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-06: 按週升冪的工作負載（長條）與結案效率（折線）。影響：工單上升而結案率下降表明積壓風險。對策：增加短期產能，優先處理積壓工單，並強制執行每日結案目標直至比率穩定。 Benchmark — Healthy: balanced regional demand; Warning: a property or region with outsized JO load.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-07: 統計集團所有酒店中需求量最高的服務項目。點擊長條可查看該項目的每日工單趨勢。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across service items; Warning: one item dominating chain volume or spiking on a given day.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-08: 每週逾時量趨勢，用於及早發現服務中斷。影響：逾時激增會降低賓客滿意度並增加重複聯繫。對策：確定根本原因週，修復路由/升級延遲，並設定逾時激增的警報閾值。 Benchmark — Good: average response ≤ 5 min; Watch: 5–15 min; Bad: > 15 min at any hotel.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-09: 前10部門依狀態構成的縱向堆疊視圖。影響：特定部門的高未結/待處理占比表明佇列擁堵。對策：重新分配工單，清除阻塞因素，並設定部門級在製品限制並每日評審。 Benchmark — Good: P90 response ≤ 15 min; Watch: 15–30 min; Bad: > 30 min (chronic slow-response hotel).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-10: 依前N類別顯示需求（長條）和結案率（折線）。影響：高量/低結案類別是關鍵績效差距。對策：指定類別負責人，建立操作手冊，並按週追蹤各類別結案率恢復情況。 Benchmark — Good: average create-to-complete ≤ 30 min; Watch: 30–60 min; Bad: > 60 min.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-11: 排名最高需求的服務項目。影響：項目集中可能造成持續營運壓力。對策：將常見任務打包，自動化重複步驟，並為主要項目預先分配資源。 Benchmark — Healthy: balanced quantity load across hotels; Warning: a hotel with concentrated demand needing resource reallocation.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-12: 每家酒店延誤工單數量（delay_duration > 0）。點擊長條查看該酒店24小時延誤工單分佈。 Benchmark — Healthy: delayed count near zero; Warning: a hotel or hour band concentrating delayed jobs.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-13: Completed job count per hotel. Click a bar to see its 24-hour completed job distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: completions track staffed hours; Warning: completion peaks in thin-coverage hours.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-14: Timeout job count per hotel. Click a bar to see its 24-hour timeout job distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: timeout near zero; Warning: timeout clustered at specific hotels or hours.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-15: 柱狀圖顯示各酒店工單總量。點擊酒店可下鑽至工單狀態細分，再點擊狀態可查看完成時長分佈（< 15分鐘至8小時以上）。 Benchmark — Healthy: majority of completions < 1 h; Warning: significant volume in 4–8 h or 8+ h buckets.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-16: 依部門的升級集中度，用於識別流程壓力點。 Benchmark — Healthy: category demand spread; Warning: concentrated category pressure at a specific hotel.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-17: 依部門的重新指派集中度，用於識別路由低效。 Benchmark — Healthy: varied item mix; Warning: one item dominating a hotel (candidate to standardize or pre-procure).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-18: 依類別的總違規分鐘數集中度，含項目下鑽。影響：違規分鐘集中可識別SLA風險在財務與聲譽上最高的領域。對策：優先對慢性違規項目進行流程重新設計與升級治理。 Benchmark — Healthy: requests spread across origin departments; Warning: one origin department dominating (upstream gap).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-19: 依類別的升級集中度；點擊檢視項目級問題領域。影響：高升級率表明服務不穩定或權責不清。對策：加強一線決策權，更新操作手冊，明確升級觸發條件。 Benchmark — Healthy: balanced assignment across departments; Warning: a department absorbing disproportionate execution load.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-20: 重新指派的最高部門。影響：頻繁重新指派會增加週期時間與問責缺口。對策：改進指派準確性規則、技能映射與接收時的分類品質。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across source departments; Warning: a concentrated demand source (target for preventive action).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-21: Drills from hotel into service category, then a rank-grouped service-item range, down to individual items, showing Total Order, Response Time, Average Completion Duration, and Delay Rate together. Benchmark — Good when Delay Rate <= 15% and Response Time <= 15 min; Bad when Delay Rate > 30% or Response Time > 30 min.
chart_notes_jo.jo-01: 延誤工單（延誤 > 0）按時段（00:00–23:00）分佈。點擊時段可下鑽至該時段前10延誤服務項目。 Benchmark — Healthy: delayed count near zero and flat across hours; Warning: delay spikes clustered in specific hours (add peak-hour coverage).
chart_notes_jo.jo-02: Columns show delayed job counts grouped by delay-duration bucket. Click a bucket to drill into the top service items within that delay range. Benchmark — Good: most delays < 15 min with few items repeating; Watch: a bucket ≥ 1h holds > 20% of delays; Bad: 4+ h / 8+ h buckets are non-trivial and dominated by one or two service items (systemic bottleneck).
chart_notes_jo.jo-03: Top 10 service items by completed jobs (bar). Click an item to drill into its completed-job duration distribution. Benchmark — Good: most completed jobs in the ≤ 30 min buckets; Watch: a growing 1–4 h share; Bad: a heavy 4 h+ tail for a high-volume item (slow execution).
chart_notes_jo.jo-04: Colored bars show job count per service category; the line shows average service (resolution) duration in minutes for that category. Benchmark — Good: high-volume categories have low average duration; Watch: a category combines high volume with rising duration; Bad: a low-volume category has a disproportionately long average duration (process bottleneck).
chart_notes_jo.jo-05: Click a service category slice to drill down into top service items by volume. Benchmark — Healthy: no single item dominates a category; Warning: one item is a large share of a high-volume category (recurring strain).
chart_notes_jo.jo-06: Job statuses ranked by total count (bar). Click a status to drill into its 24-hour distribution. Benchmark — Good: most jobs in completed/closed status and 24-h spread is flat; Watch: timeout or delayed count > 10% of total; Bad: a growing open/pending share or timeout spike in specific hours.
chart_notes_jo.jo-07: Compares weekly incoming volume with SLA performance in ascending week order. Benchmark — Good: SLA ≥ 95% held through peak weeks; Watch: 85–95%; Bad: SLA < 85% or dropping on surge weeks.
chart_notes_jo.jo-08: Weekly timeout volume trend to detect service interruptions early. Benchmark — Healthy: flat or falling timeout count near zero; Warning: any upward timeout spike week-over-week.
chart_notes_jo.jo-09: Vertical stacked view of status mix across the top 10 departments by volume. Benchmark — Healthy: Open + Pending < 15% per department; Warning: a department above 30% Open/Pending (queue congestion).
chart_notes_jo.jo-10: Shows demand and close rate by top service categories. Benchmark — Good: high-volume categories close ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: a high-volume category closing < 75% (critical gap).
chart_notes_jo.jo-11: Top 10 service item categories ranked by total job count (column). Click a category to drill into its 24-hour distribution. Benchmark — Good: top category ≤ 30% of total jobs and 24-h spread is even; Watch: one category dominates > 40%; Bad: a single category > 50% with a sharp peak hour (staffing gap).
chart_notes_jo.jo-12: Shows departments receiving the highest assignment load. Benchmark — Healthy: assignment load balanced across departments; Warning: one department above ~30% of assignments (overload / burnout risk).
chart_notes_jo.jo-13: Shows request-origin departments generating the most JOs. Benchmark — Healthy: requests spread across source departments; Warning: one source department dominates (upstream process gap).
chart_notes_jo.jo-14: Shows departments completing the highest JO volume. Benchmark — Healthy: completion share ≈ assignment share per department; Warning: completion share well below assignment share (execution bottleneck).
chart_notes_jo.jo-15: Highlights locations with the largest JO demand. Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across locations; Warning: one location is a clear hotspot needing dedicated staffing or preventive action.
chart_notes_jo.jo-16: Escalation concentration by department to identify process stress points. Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5% of jobs; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10%, especially concentrated in one department.
chart_notes_jo.jo-17: Reassignment concentration by department to identify routing inefficiency. Benchmark — Good: reassignment ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–15%; Bad: > 15% (routing / triage inaccuracy).
chart_notes_jo.jo-18: Total breach minutes by category with item drilldown. Benchmark — Healthy: breach minutes near zero and evenly low; Warning: minutes concentrated in a few categories (highest SLA and financial risk).
chart_notes_jo.jo-19: Escalation concentration by category with item-level drilldown. Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10% concentrated in specific categories.
chart_notes_jo.jo-20: Departments with the highest reassignment volume. Benchmark — Good: reassignment ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–15%; Bad: > 15% (accountability gaps and added cycle time).
chart_notes_jo.jo-21: Resolution duration profile by department for identifying long-tail execution delays. Benchmark — Good: median resolution ≤ 30 min; Watch: 30–60 min; Bad: > 60 min or a long right tail in one department.
chart_notes_jo.jo-22: P90 resolution time by category and item showing worst-case completion behavior. Benchmark — Good: P90 resolution ≤ 60 min; Watch: 60–120 min; Bad: > 120 min (worst-case completions driving complaints).
chart_notes_jo.jo-23: Completed jobs by hour of day. Click a bar to drill into completion duration distribution for that hour. Benchmark — Healthy: completions track staffed hours with most in low-duration buckets; Warning: completion peak in thinly-staffed hours or a long-duration tail.
chart_notes_jo.jo-24: Acknowledged jobs by hour of day. Click a bar to drill into response duration distribution for that hour. Benchmark — Good: response ≤ 5 min in peak hours; Watch: 5–15 min; Bad: > 15 min where demand is highest.
chart_notes_jo.jo-25: Escalated jobs by hour of day. Click a bar to drill into overdue duration distribution for that hour. Benchmark — Healthy: few escalations with short overdue minutes; Warning: escalations cluster in specific hours with long overdue durations.
chart_notes_jo.jo-26: Total jobs by hour of day. Click a bar to drill into the top service item categories for that hour. Benchmark — Healthy: hourly demand matches the staffing curve; Warning: demand peaks where coverage is thin (review shift boundaries).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-23: Drills from hotel into job status, then a rank-grouped service-item range, down to individual items, showing Total Order, Response Time, Average Completion Duration, and Delay Rate together. Benchmark — Good when Delay Rate <= 15% and Response Time <= 15 min; Bad when Delay Rate > 30% or Response Time > 30 min.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-24: Drills from hotel into VIP vs Non-VIP guests, then a rank-grouped service-item range, down to individual items, showing Total Order, Response Time, Average Completion Duration, and Delay Rate together. Benchmark — Good when Delay Rate <= 15% and Response Time <= 15 min; Bad when Delay Rate > 30% or Response Time > 30 min.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-25: Drills from hotel into on-time vs delayed jobs, then a rank-grouped service-item range, down to individual items, showing Total Order, Response Time, Average Completion Duration, and Delay Rate together. Benchmark — Good when Delay Rate <= 15% and Response Time <= 15 min; Bad when Delay Rate > 30% or Response Time > 30 min.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-26: Drills from hotel into escalation group, then a rank-grouped service-item range, down to individual items, showing Total Order, Response Time, Average Completion Duration, and Delay Rate together. Benchmark — Good when Delay Rate <= 15% and Response Time <= 15 min; Bad when Delay Rate > 30% or Response Time > 30 min.
chart_notes_jo.jo-27: Job count by status. Click a status bar to drill into its 24-hour distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: Completed/Closed dominate and Open + Pending < 15%; Warning: a large Open/Pending status at specific hours.
chart_notes_jo.jo-28: Overdue job count (delay > 0) by service item category. Click a category bar to drill into its 24-hour distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: overdue count near zero; Warning: overdue (delay > 0) concentrated in a category or hour band.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-27: Drills from hotel into hour of day, then a rank-grouped service-item range, down to individual items, showing Total Order, Response Time, Average Completion Duration, and Delay Rate together. Benchmark — Good when Delay Rate <= 15% and Response Time <= 15 min; Bad when Delay Rate > 30% or Response Time > 30 min.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-28: Drills from hotel into completion duration buckets, then a rank-grouped service-item range, down to individual items, showing Total Order, Response Time, Average Completion Duration, and Delay Rate together. Benchmark — Good when Delay Rate <= 15% and Response Time <= 15 min; Bad when Delay Rate > 30% or Response Time > 30 min.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-29: Drills from hotel into the department of delayed jobs only, then a rank-grouped service-item range, down to individual items, showing Total Order, Response Time, Average Completion Duration, and Delay Rate together. Benchmark — Good when Delay Rate <= 15% and Response Time <= 15 min; Bad when Delay Rate > 30% or Response Time > 30 min.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-30: Drills from hotel into buckets of each service item's own delay rate, then a rank-grouped service-item range, down to individual items, showing Total Order, Response Time, Average Completion Duration, and Delay Rate together. Benchmark — Good when Delay Rate <= 15% and Response Time <= 15 min; Bad when Delay Rate > 30% or Response Time > 30 min.

chart_notes_co.co-01: 依清潔狀態分佈的工單，並可下鑽到房型。 Benchmark — Healthy: Completed dominates with Pending + In-Progress < 15%; Warning: a room type stuck with a high pending share (release bottleneck).
chart_notes_co.co-02: 住客狀態的工作量與平均清潔時長對比。 Benchmark — Good: check-out clean ≤ 30 min, stay-over ≤ 20 min; Watch: +50% over standard; Bad: durations well above standard for that stay type.
chart_notes_co.co-03: 已完成工單的時長分佈，可下鑽到各區間的服務員明細。 Benchmark — Healthy: most cleans in the ≤ 30 min buckets; Warning: a tail > 45 min or specific attendants concentrated in slow buckets (coaching).
chart_notes_co.co-04: 按小時分佈的完成工單，可下鑽到各小時的清潔時長分佈。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions peak during the AM shift with most ≤ 30 min; Warning: completion peak outside staffed hours or a long-duration tail.
chart_notes_co.co-05: 按清潔服務類型的平均耗時。 Benchmark — Good: full clean ≤ 30 min, turndown ≤ 15 min, deep clean ≤ 60 min; Warning: any type exceeding its standard (training or classification gap).
chart_notes_co.co-06: 房型工作量與平均清潔時長對比。 Benchmark — Good: standard room ≤ 30 min, suite ≤ 45 min; Watch: +50% over standard; Bad: well above (inconsistent SOP).
chart_notes_co.co-07: 住客狀態分佈，可下鑽到清潔狀態。 Benchmark — Healthy: check-out rooms clear quickly; Warning: check-out rooms accumulating Pending disproportionately.
chart_notes_co.co-08: 按服務員統計已完成工單產出。 Benchmark — Healthy: output balanced across attendants; Warning: a wide spread between top and bottom performers (workload imbalance or credit issues).
chart_notes_co.co-09: 準時與延遲完成的對比分佈。 Benchmark — Good: on-time ≥ 90%; Watch: 80–90%; Bad: < 80% (guests waiting at check-in).
chart_notes_co.co-10: 質檢通過/失敗與返工壓力同圖展示。 Benchmark — Good: re-clean + inspection-fail ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10% (training or equipment gaps, wasted labour).
chart_notes_co.co-11: 總量、已完成、延遲與返工工單的日趨勢。 Benchmark — Healthy: completed tracks total with delayed and re-clean flat and low; Warning: a rising delayed or re-clean line over time.
chart_notes_co.co-12: 準時與延遲工作量對比平均清潔時長。 Benchmark — Healthy: fast + on-time dominates; Warning: a growing slow + delayed segment (critical), or slow + on-time (over-staffed).
chart_notes_co.co-13: 已完成工單的時間分佈。 Benchmark — Good: behind < 10%; Watch: 10–20%; Bad: > 20% of orders behind schedule.
chart_notes_co.co-14: 按小時與樓層展示已完成積分熱力圖。 Benchmark — Healthy: credit concentrated in AM hours evenly across floors; Warning: floors or hours with little output (staffing imbalance).
chart_notes_co.co-15: 按小時分佈的全部清潔工單，可下鑽到各小時的清潔時長分佈。 Benchmark — Healthy: most orders complete ≤ 30 min through peak hours; Warning: a long-duration tail at busy hours.
chart_notes_co.co-16: 按小時分佈的全部清潔工單，可下鑽到各小時的住客狀態。 Benchmark — Healthy: check-out cleans peak in the AM aligned to check-out time; Warning: stay-over backlog spilling into late hours.
chart_notes_co.co-17: 按小時分佈的全部清潔工單，可下鑽到各小時的清潔狀態。 Benchmark — Healthy: Completed dominates each hour; Warning: Pending / In-Progress rising during peak hours.
chart_notes_co.co-18: 按小時分佈的完成工單，可下鑽到各小時的服務員明細。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions spread across attendants each hour; Warning: a few attendants carrying the peak hours.
chart_notes_co.co-19: 按小時分佈的完成工單，可下鑽到各小時的準時/延遲分佈。 Benchmark — Good: on-time ≥ 90% every hour; Bad: delayed share climbing in specific hours.
chart_notes_co.co-20: 按小時分佈的全部清潔工單，可下鑽到各小時的清潔類型。 Benchmark — Healthy: cleaning-type mix matches the shift plan; Warning: deep cleans clustering in peak check-out hours.
chart_notes_co.co-21: 清潔時長分佈，可下鑽到各區間的住客狀態。 Benchmark — Healthy: most cleans ≤ 30 min — use P75/P90 to set the SLA; Warning: a long tail for a stay type.
chart_notes_co.co-22: 清潔時長分佈，可下鑽到各區間的服務員明細。 Benchmark — Healthy: a tight ≤ 30 min cluster; Warning: specific attendants in > 45 min buckets (coaching).

chart_bv_co.co-09: #1 · Guest SLA — most direct measure of on-time room delivery; a large delayed bar means guests are waiting at check-in right now.
chart_bv_co.co-10: #2 · Quality cost — every re-clean consumes full labour with zero incremental revenue; inspection failures indicate training or equipment gaps.
chart_bv_co.co-11: #6 · Performance trend — daily volume and completion trend reveals whether the property is improving or degrading; feeds GM progress reporting.
chart_bv_co.co-12: #4 · Speed-punctuality — separates four archetypes: fast+on-time (benchmark), fast+delayed (scheduling), slow+on-time (over-staffed), slow+delayed (critical).
chart_bv_co.co-14: #8 · Floor productivity — shows which floors complete at which hours; reveals staffing imbalances and informs supervisor patrol and elevator-scheduling decisions.
chart_bv_co.co-19: #14 · Delay by hour — shows which hours produce the most delays; direct input for adjusting shift-start times and adding peak-hour reinforcement.
chart_bv_co.co-21: #13 · Stay-type distribution — full duration spread per stay type (not just average); P75 and P90 values set defensible SLA thresholds.
chart_bv_co.co-24: #20 · Duration spread by room — a wide spread for suites signals inconsistent SOPs; narrow spread confirms uniform room-type cleaning standards across attendants.
chart_bv_co.co-25: #15 · Delay-cause clock — shows which stay type generates delayed orders at which hours; enables targeted supervisor reinforcement at the right time.
chart_bv_co.co-28: #16 · Demand timing — shows when check-out vs stay-over cleans are completed through the day; drives early check-in feasibility and breakfast-shift sizing.
chart_bv_co.co-31: #17 · Delay hot-spot — identifies the specific hours producing the most delayed completions; primary input for shift-structure redesign.
chart_bv_co.co-34: #18 · SLA evidence — P50/P75/P90 duration by stay type; the document a property manager brings to a standards review to argue for differentiated SLA limits.
chart_bv_co.co-37: #19 · SLA calibration — shows the duration bracket where on-time orders flip to delayed; reveals whether the current SLA time limit is correctly set.
chart_bv_co.co-39: #21 · Team Productivity Depth — three-level drilldown (floor -> attendant -> avg duration) pinpoints which floors and individuals run slow cleans for targeted coaching.
chart_bv_co.co-40: #22 · Shift Coverage Depth — three-level drilldown (floor -> attendant -> 24h clock) reveals when each attendant actually cleans, exposing shift-coverage gaps.
chart_bv_co.co-41: #23 · Inspector Team Productivity Depth — three-level drilldown (inspector -> attendant -> avg duration) pinpoints which supervised teams and individuals run slow cleans for targeted coaching.
chart_bv_co.co-42: #24 · Inspector Shift Coverage Depth — three-level drilldown (inspector -> attendant -> 24h clock) reveals when each supervised attendant actually cleans, exposing shift-coverage gaps.

chart_bv_co.cco-02: #5 · Productivity benchmark — outlier hotels with slower average cleaning speed signal staffing gaps or process failures warranting GM performance review.
chart_bv_co.cco-04: #9 · Demand-mix — reveals each hotel's workload split by stay type; 80% check-out load requires a fundamentally different staffing model than 60% stay-overs.
chart_bv_co.cco-05: #12 · Asset mix — shows how room-type distribution drives per-hotel workload; feeds revenue-management SLA differentiation negotiations with property GMs.
chart_bv_co.cco-06: #7 · Output accounting — pairs credit with order count to surface high-volume/low-credit hotels indicating shortcuts or credit mis-classification.
chart_bv_co.cco-07: #3 · Executive ranking — most actionable C-suite chart; ranks hotels by verified cleaning output; dual-axis catches volume gaming through low-credit rooms.

chart_bv_co.cco-09: #6 · Quality cost — chain-wide re-clean and inspection-failure data separates systemic (training/policy) failures from isolated property-level management issues.
chart_bv_co.cco-11: #8 · Speed-punctuality — four archetypes per hotel (crisis, over-staffed, scheduling issue, benchmark) guide intervention priority across the chain.
chart_bv_co.cco-15: #4 · Risk index — aggregates delay rate, re-clean rate, and credit gap into a single ranked composite per hotel; becomes the corporate intervention watch-list.
chart_bv_co.cco-16: #10 · Staffing peaks — shows which hotels hit cleaning demand peaks at which hours; informs cross-property float-staff deployment and AM shift boundary decisions.
chart_bv_co.cco-17: #11 · Quality leakage — quantifies rework burden per hotel; makes re-clean and inspection-failure costs visible and builds the business case for training investment.
chart_bv_co.cco-24: #14 · Stay-type calibration — actual duration spread by stay type across all hotels; the evidence base for chain-wide SLA time-standard differentiation.

chart_bv_co.cco-31: #16 · Demand timing — shows when check-out demand peaks vs stay-overs across hotels; drives AM shift-boundary and early check-in policy decisions.
chart_bv_co.cco-32: #17 · Bottleneck timing — reveals at which hours pending orders pile up chain-wide; identifies systemic AM rush handoff failures across all properties.
chart_bv_co.cco-34: #18 · Delay hot-spot clock — shows which hours produce the most delayed completions chain-wide; sets escalation trigger windows and shift-design priorities.
chart_bv_co.cco-37: #19 · SLA target evidence — P50/P75/P90 cleaning duration by stay type across the chain; the document for corporate standards-committee meetings.
chart_bv_co.cco-40: #20 · SLA threshold check — shows the duration where on-time orders flip to delayed chain-wide; validates whether current SLA time limits are correctly set.

chart_bv_co.cco-44: #22 · Inspector Accountability Depth — four-level drilldown (hotel → floor → inspector average credit → daily performance) traces inspection quality and workload down to the individual inspector.
chart_bv_co.cco-45: #23 · Inspector Team Productivity Depth — four-level drilldown (hotel → inspector → attendant → avg duration) pinpoints which supervised teams and individuals run slow cleans for targeted coaching.

chart_notes_mo.cmo01: 外環顯示各酒店的MO總工單數。點擊酒店切片可下鑽檢視其前N維修類別。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across hotels; Warning: a hotel generating outsized MO volume (chain benchmark).
chart_notes_mo.cmo02: 外環顯示各酒店的MO總工單數。點擊酒店切片可下鑽檢視其狀態構成。 Benchmark — Healthy: every hotel ≥ 90% completed; Warning: a hotel with a large open or pending backlog.
chart_notes_mo.cmo03: 依酒店拆分的每日MO量趨勢，用於連鎖級別比較。 Benchmark — Healthy: stable daily volume per hotel; Warning: sustained spikes or recurring peak days at a property.
chart_notes_mo.cmo04: 酒店級完成率比較，用於瞭解維修執行健康狀況。 Benchmark — Good: completion ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: < 75% at any hotel.
chart_notes_mo.cmo05: 依酒店比較未結工單壓力。 Benchmark — Good: open rate ≤ 10%; Watch: 10–20%; Bad: > 20% (backlog pressure) at any hotel.
chart_notes_mo.cmo06: 附酒店標籤的國家級地圖，用於連鎖範圍內的維修可見性。 Benchmark — Healthy: balanced regional load; Warning: a property or region with outsized maintenance demand.
chart_notes_mo.cmo07: 依酒店比較賓客相關與非賓客相關的MO需求。 Benchmark — Healthy: guest-related share low chain-wide; Warning: a hotel with rising guest-related volume (complaint risk).
chart_notes_mo.cmo08: 各酒店間的平均嚴重度比較。 Benchmark — Good: average severity low and stable; Bad: a hotel with elevated average severity.
chart_notes_mo.cmo09: 依酒店的堆疊類別比較，用於瞭解維修需求集中情況。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across categories; Warning: one category dominating a hotel's mix.
chart_notes_mo.cmo10: 展示各酒店最高類別的支配程度。 Benchmark — Healthy: top-category share < 40% per hotel; Warning: > 50% concentration at a hotel (single-point demand).
chart_notes_mo.cmo11: 依位置或樓棟的酒店前N維修熱點熱力圖。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across locations; Warning: a building or location hotspot needing preventive focus.
chart_notes_mo.cmo12: 連鎖集團內最頻繁的維修資產或缺陷的樹狀圖。 Benchmark — Healthy: no single asset or defect dominates the chain; Warning: one tile much larger (chain-wide preventive-maintenance target).
chart_notes_mo.mo-01: Top 10 maintenance categories by work-order volume. Click a category to drill into its job-status breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: Completed dominant per category with Open + Cancelled < 15%; Warning: a category with a high open or cancelled share.
chart_notes_mo.mo-02: Work order status distribution. Click a status to drill into the created-by departments responsible. Benchmark — Good: overall completion ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: < 75%, or a department concentrating Open/Pending orders.
chart_notes_mo.mo-03: Daily MO volume trend split by hotel for chain-level comparison. Benchmark — Healthy: stable daily volume with no runaway backlog; Warning: sustained upward spikes or recurring peak days without staffing.
chart_notes_mo.mo-04: Top 10 maintenance defects by total volume. Click a defect bar to drill into its daily order trend. Benchmark — Healthy: defect counts flat or declining; Warning: a defect rising day-over-day (emerging systemic issue).
chart_notes_mo.mo-05: Top 10 defects by total work orders (bars, left axis) vs average resolution time in hours (line, right axis). Benchmark — Good: average resolution ≤ 4h; Watch: 4–8h; Bad: a high-volume defect averaging > 8h (resource bottleneck).
chart_notes_mo.mo-06: Top 10 maintenance categories by work order volume (bars, left axis) vs average resolution time in hours (line, right axis). Benchmark — Good: average resolution ≤ 4h; Watch: 4–8h; Bad: a high-volume category averaging > 8h.
chart_notes_mo.mo-07: Compares guest-related and non-guest-related MO demand by hotel. Benchmark — Healthy: guest-related share low and resolved fastest; Warning: rising guest-related volume (complaint risk).
chart_notes_mo.mo-08: Average severity comparison across hotels. Benchmark — Good: severity index stable and low; Watch: gradual rise; Bad: a climbing index (escalating unresolved risk).
chart_notes_mo.mo-09: Distribution of work orders by resolution time. X-axis = duration buckets (< 1h to 24h+), Y-axis = number of orders. Benchmark — Healthy: majority of orders in the < 1h–4h buckets; Watch: a growing 8h+ share; Bad: a heavy 24h+ tail (process or resource bottleneck).
chart_notes_mo.mo-10: Number of work orders created by hour of day (00:00–23:00). Reveals peak maintenance request windows for staffing decisions. Benchmark — Healthy: request peaks fall within staffed shifts; Warning: peaks in low-coverage hours (adjust on-call and shift cover).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-01: Outer donut shows total MO work orders by hotel. Click a hotel slice to see its created-by department mix, then click a department to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: defects spread across departments; Warning: one department concentrates a disproportionate defect volume.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-02: Columns show total MO work orders by hotel. Click a hotel to see the guest-related vs non-guest-related split, then click a slice to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: non-guest-related preventive work dominates; Warning: a hotel with a high guest-related defect share (guest-impacting maintenance risk).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-03: Stacked columns show job status mix per hotel; the line shows average resolution (completed) duration in hours per hotel. Benchmark — Healthy: high completed share with a stable/low average duration; Warning: a hotel where duration is climbing along with a growing open/pending stack.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-04: Outer donut shows total MO work orders by hotel. Click a hotel to see its escalation-level mix, then click a level to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: Level 0 dominates; Warning: a hotel with a growing share at Level 2+ concentrated in a few defects (systemic escalation risk).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-05: Compares open-order pressure by hotel. Benchmark — Good: open rate ≤ 10%; Watch: 10–20%; Bad: > 20% (backlog pressure) at any hotel.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-06: Country-level map with hotel labels for chain-wide maintenance visibility. Benchmark — Healthy: balanced regional load; Warning: a property or region with outsized maintenance demand.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-07: Compares guest-related and non-guest-related MO demand by hotel. Benchmark — Healthy: guest-related share low chain-wide; Warning: a hotel with rising guest-related volume (complaint risk).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-08: Average severity comparison across hotels. Benchmark — Good: average severity low and stable; Bad: a hotel with elevated average severity.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-09: Chain-wide distribution of work orders by resolution time. Click a bucket to see per-hotel breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: majority of orders in the < 1h–4h buckets chain-wide; Watch: a growing 8h+ share; Bad: a heavy 24h+ tail at any hotel.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-10: Chain-wide 24-hour work order distribution. Click an hour to see per-hotel breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: chain request peaks fall within staffed shifts; Warning: peaks in low-coverage hours at specific hotels.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-11: Top 10 defects with resolution > 24 hours across the chain. Click a bar to see per-hotel breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: count near zero; Watch: a few recurring defects; Bad: defects routinely breaching 24h at specific hotels (chronic failures).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-12: Treemap of the most frequent maintenance assets or defects across the chain. Benchmark — Healthy: no single asset or defect dominates the chain; Warning: one tile much larger (chain-wide preventive-maintenance target).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-13: Columns show total MO work orders by hotel. Click a hotel to see its category mix, a category to see its top defects, then a defect to see its resolution (completed) duration distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: most defects resolve within the < 1h–4h buckets; Warning: an 8h+ or 24h+ tail concentrated in one category/defect (resourcing or parts-availability gap).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-14: Columns show total MO work orders by hotel. Click a hotel to see its resolution (completed) duration distribution, then click a bucket to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: majority of orders in the < 1h–4h buckets; Warning: a growing 24h+ share (process or resource bottleneck).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-15: Columns show total MO work orders by hotel. Click a hotel to see its delayed (escalated, past-deadline) duration distribution, then click a bucket to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: few or no delayed orders; Warning: a growing 8h+/24h+ delayed share (SLA and escalation risk).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-16: Columns show total MO work orders by hotel. Click a hotel to see its 24-hour creation distribution, then click an hour to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: request peaks fall within staffed shifts; Warning: peaks in low-coverage hours (adjust on-call and shift cover).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-17: Columns show total MO work orders by hotel. Click a hotel to see its floor breakdown, then click a floor to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: defects spread evenly across floors; Warning: one floor concentrates a disproportionate defect volume (localized asset or infrastructure issue).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-18: Columns show total MO work orders by hotel. Click a hotel to see its MO/PM type split, a type to see its created-by department mix, then a department to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: PM (preventive) share is substantial relative to MO (reactive); Warning: MO heavily dominates PM (reactive-maintenance-driven operation).
chart_notes_mo.mo-11: Top 10 defects by count of orders taking > 24 hours to resolve. Click a bar to drill into its 24-hour distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: count near zero; Watch: a few recurring defects; Bad: defects routinely breaching 24h (chronic failures).
chart_notes_mo.mo-12: Treemap of the most frequent maintenance assets or defects at this hotel. Benchmark — Healthy: no single asset or defect dominates; Warning: one tile much larger than the rest (target for preventive maintenance).
chart_notes_mo.mo-13: Columns show total work orders by category. Click a category to see its top defects, then a defect to see its resolution (completed) duration distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: most defects resolve within the < 1h–4h buckets; Warning: an 8h+ or 24h+ tail concentrated in one category/defect (resourcing or parts-availability gap).
chart_notes_mo.mo-14: Columns show total work orders by resolution (completed) duration bucket. Click a bucket to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: majority of orders in the < 1h–4h buckets; Warning: a growing 24h+ share (process or resource bottleneck).
chart_notes_mo.mo-15: Columns show total work orders by delayed (escalated, past-deadline) duration bucket. Click a bucket to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: few or no delayed orders; Warning: a growing 8h+/24h+ delayed share (SLA and escalation risk).
chart_notes_mo.mo-16: Columns show total work orders by hour of day (00:00–23:00). Click an hour to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: request peaks fall within staffed shifts; Warning: peaks in low-coverage hours (adjust on-call and shift cover).
chart_notes_mo.mo-17: Columns show total work orders by floor. Click a floor to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: defects spread evenly across floors; Warning: one floor concentrates a disproportionate defect volume (localized asset or infrastructure issue).
chart_notes_mo.mo-18: Columns show total work orders by MO/PM type. Click a type to see its created-by department mix, then a department to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: PM (preventive) share is substantial relative to MO (reactive); Warning: MO heavily dominates PM (reactive-maintenance-driven operation).

chart_formulas_mo.cmo01: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then TOP category BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo02: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then COUNT(*) BY job_status WITHIN hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo03: COUNT(*) BY created_date, hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo04: completed_orders / total_orders * 100 BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo05: open_orders / total_orders * 100 BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo06: Country Value = SUM(total_orders) GROUP BY country_code; Label = CONCAT(hotel_code, total_orders) list per country WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo07: COUNT(*) guest_related vs non_guest_related BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo08: AVG(severity_weight) BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo09: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, category WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo10: MAX(category_count) / total_orders * 100 BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo11: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, location WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo12: COUNT(*) BY defect_or_asset WHERE type = MO

hmo_chart_notes.cmo12: 連鎖集團內最頻繁的維修資產或缺陷的樹狀圖。 Benchmark — Healthy: no single asset or defect dominates the chain; Warning: one tile much larger (chain-wide preventive-maintenance target).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-01: Top 10 maintenance categories by work-order volume. Click a category to drill into its job-status breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: Completed dominant per category with Open + Cancelled < 15%; Warning: a category with a high open or cancelled share.
hmo_chart_notes.mo-02: Work order status distribution. Click a status to drill into the created-by departments responsible. Benchmark — Good: overall completion ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: < 75%, or a department concentrating Open/Pending orders.
hmo_chart_notes.mo-03: 依酒店拆分的每日MO量趨勢，用於連鎖級別比較。 Benchmark — Healthy: stable daily volume with no runaway backlog; Warning: sustained upward spikes or recurring peak days without staffing.
hmo_chart_notes.mo-04: 酒店級完成率比較，用於瞭解維修執行健康狀況。 Benchmark — Healthy: defect counts flat or declining; Warning: a defect rising day-over-day (emerging systemic issue).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-05: 依酒店比較未結工單壓力。 Benchmark — Good: average resolution ≤ 4h; Watch: 4–8h; Bad: a high-volume defect averaging > 8h (resource bottleneck).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-06: Top 10 maintenance categories by work order volume (bars, left axis) vs average resolution time in hours (line, right axis). Benchmark — Good: average resolution ≤ 4h; Watch: 4–8h; Bad: a high-volume category averaging > 8h.
hmo_chart_notes.mo-07: 依酒店比較賓客相關與非賓客相關的MO需求。 Benchmark — Healthy: guest-related share low and resolved fastest; Warning: rising guest-related volume (complaint risk).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-08: 各酒店間的平均嚴重度比較。 Benchmark — Good: severity index stable and low; Watch: gradual rise; Bad: a climbing index (escalating unresolved risk).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-09: Distribution of work orders by resolution time. X-axis = duration buckets (< 1h to 24h+), Y-axis = number of orders. Benchmark — Healthy: majority of orders in the < 1h–4h buckets; Watch: a growing 8h+ share; Bad: a heavy 24h+ tail (process or resource bottleneck).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-10: Number of work orders created by hour of day (00:00–23:00). Reveals peak maintenance request windows for staffing decisions. Benchmark — Healthy: request peaks fall within staffed shifts; Warning: peaks in low-coverage hours (adjust on-call and shift cover).
hmo_chart_notes.cmo-09: Chain-wide distribution of work orders by resolution time. Click a bucket to see per-hotel breakdown.
hmo_chart_notes.cmo-10: Chain-wide 24-hour work order distribution. Click an hour to see per-hotel breakdown.
hmo_chart_notes.cmo-11: Top 10 defects with resolution > 24 hours across the chain. Click a bar to see per-hotel breakdown.
hmo_chart_notes.chart_11: 依位置或樓棟的酒店前N維修熱點熱力圖。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across locations; Warning: a building or location hotspot needing preventive focus.
hmo_chart_notes.chart_12: 連鎖集團內最頻繁的維修資產或缺陷的樹狀圖。 Benchmark — Healthy: no single asset or defect dominates the chain; Warning: one tile much larger (chain-wide preventive-maintenance target).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-11: Top 10 defects by count of orders taking > 24 hours to resolve. Click a bar to drill into its 24-hour distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: count near zero; Watch: a few recurring defects; Bad: defects routinely breaching 24h (chronic failures).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-12: Treemap of the most frequent maintenance assets or defects at this hotel. Benchmark — Healthy: no single asset or defect dominates; Warning: one tile much larger than the rest (target for preventive maintenance).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-13: Columns show total work orders by category. Click a category to see its top defects, then a defect to see its resolution (completed) duration distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: most defects resolve within the < 1h–4h buckets; Warning: an 8h+ or 24h+ tail concentrated in one category/defect (resourcing or parts-availability gap).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-14: Columns show total work orders by resolution (completed) duration bucket. Click a bucket to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: majority of orders in the < 1h–4h buckets; Warning: a growing 24h+ share (process or resource bottleneck).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-15: Columns show total work orders by delayed (escalated, past-deadline) duration bucket. Click a bucket to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: few or no delayed orders; Warning: a growing 8h+/24h+ delayed share (SLA and escalation risk).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-16: Columns show total work orders by hour of day (00:00–23:00). Click an hour to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: request peaks fall within staffed shifts; Warning: peaks in low-coverage hours (adjust on-call and shift cover).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-17: Columns show total work orders by floor. Click a floor to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: defects spread evenly across floors; Warning: one floor concentrates a disproportionate defect volume (localized asset or infrastructure issue).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-18: Columns show total work orders by MO/PM type. Click a type to see its created-by department mix, then a department to drill into its top defects. Benchmark — Healthy: PM (preventive) share is substantial relative to MO (reactive); Warning: MO heavily dominates PM (reactive-maintenance-driven operation).

hmo_chart_formulas.cmo01: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then TOP category BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.cmo02: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then COUNT(*) BY job_status WITHIN hotel_code WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.cmo03: COUNT(*) BY created_date, hotel_code WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.cmo04: completed_orders / total_orders * 100 BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.cmo05: open_orders / total_orders * 100 BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.cmo06: Country Value = SUM(total_orders) GROUP BY country_code; Label = CONCAT(hotel_code, total_orders) list per country WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.cmo07: COUNT(*) guest_related vs non_guest_related BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.cmo08: AVG(severity_weight) BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.cmo09: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, category WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.cmo10: MAX(category_count) / total_orders * 100 BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.cmo11: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, location WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.cmo12: COUNT(*) BY defect_or_asset WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-01: COUNT(*) BY category (top 10) DRILLDOWN COUNT(*) BY job_status WITHIN category WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-02: COUNT(*) BY job_status DRILLDOWN COUNT(*) BY created_by_department WITHIN status WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-03: COUNT(*) BY created_date, hotel_code WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-04: COUNT(*) BY defect (top 10) DRILLDOWN COUNT(*) BY created_date WITHIN defect WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-05: Bars: COUNT(*) BY defect (top 10); Line: AVG(resolution_minutes) / 60 BY defect WHERE is_completed AND type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-06: Bars: COUNT(*) BY category (top 10); Line: AVG(resolution_minutes) / 60 BY category WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-07: COUNT(*) guest_related vs non_guest_related BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-08: AVG(severity_weight) BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-09: COUNT(*) GROUP BY CASE WHEN resolution_minutes < 60 THEN '< 1h' ... ELSE '24h+' END WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-10: COUNT(*) GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_datetime) WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.chart_11: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, location WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.chart_12: COUNT(*) BY defect_or_asset WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-11: COUNT(*) BY defect WHERE resolution_minutes >= 1440 AND type = MO DRILLDOWN COUNT(*) BY HOUR(created_datetime) WITHIN defect
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-12: COUNT(*) BY defect_or_asset WHERE type = MO ORDER BY count DESC
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-13: COUNT(*) BY category, then TOP defect WITHIN category, then COUNT(*) BY resolution_duration_bucket WITHIN defect WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-14: COUNT(*) BY resolution_duration_bucket, then TOP defect WITHIN bucket WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-15: COUNT(*) BY delayed_duration_bucket, then TOP defect WITHIN bucket WHERE type = MO AND deadline_variance_minutes > 0
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-16: COUNT(*) BY HOUR(created_datetime), then TOP defect WITHIN hour WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-17: COUNT(*) BY floor, then TOP defect WITHIN floor WHERE type = MO
hmo_chart_formulas.mo-18: COUNT(*) BY type, then COUNT(*) BY created_by_department WITHIN type, then TOP defect WITHIN department WHERE type = MO OR type = PM

imc_chart_notes.cim01: 展示各酒店總數及前10事件項目，用於下鑽優先級排序。基準：良好 前3項目 <= 酒店事件的45%；不良 前3項目 > 60%（集中風險）。
imc_chart_notes.cim02: 比較酒店數量與狀態構成以檢測結案不均衡。基準：良好 已完成 >= 95% 且 待處理 <= 5%；不良 待處理 > 10%。
imc_chart_notes.cim03: 高端賓客風險與復原有效性的雙軸圖表。基準：良好 VIP結案率 >= 95%；不良 < 90%。
imc_chart_notes.cim04: 從酒店總數下鑽至前10類別，用於根本原因治理。基準：良好 最高類別 <= 20%；不良 最高類別 > 35%。
imc_chart_notes.cim05: 依酒店展示復發壓力，標記未解決的系統性問題。基準：良好 <= 15%；關注 15-25%；不良 > 25%。
imc_chart_notes.cim06: 附帶酒店標籤的國家級地圖，用於跨區域高階可見性。基準：良好 單一國家不超過連鎖事件的50%；不良 單一國家 > 70%。
imc_chart_notes.cim07: 酒店到部門下鑽，用於營運歸屬對齊。基準：良好 無部門超過酒店事件的25%；不良 > 40%。
imc_chart_notes.cim08: 酒店到來源下鑽，用於管道品質控制。基準：良好 未知來源 <= 5%；不良 > 15%。
imc_chart_notes.cim09: 依酒店堆疊比較VIP與非VIP負載。基準：良好 VIP占比 <= 6%；關注 6-10%；不良 > 10%。
imc_chart_notes.cim10: 從酒店總數下鑽至預訂來源構成，用於商業洞察。基準：良好 未知預訂 <= 5%；不良 > 15%。
imc_chart_notes.cim11: 在同一面板中比較風險、嚴重、VIP、SLA與趨勢的高階矩陣。基準：良好 風險評分 <= 60；關注 60-100；不良 > 100。
imc_chart_notes.cim12: 依加權風險對酒店進行排名，用於確定干預優先級。基準：良好 高風險酒店數量逐期減少；不良 最高酒店風險週環比增長 > 10%。
imc_chart_notes.cim13: 用於策略性風險分類的氣泡象限圖（高數量+高嚴重度=立即關注）。基準：良好 無酒店位於右上高風險象限；不良 多個酒店聚集在該象限。
imc_chart_notes.cim14: 區域矩陣比較嚴重、VIP、SLA違規與趨勢強度。基準：良好 所有風險儲存格趨勢下降或保持綠色；不良 同一區域有2個以上指標為紅色。
imc_chart_notes.cim15: 依酒店展示部門風險強度，用於針對性治理行動。基準：良好 最高部門風險 <= 酒店總量的20%；不良 > 35%。
imc_chart_notes.cim16: 對根本原因與累計貢獻進行排名，用於改善優先級排序。基準：良好 前5原因 <= 45%；不良 前5 > 60%。
imc_chart_notes.cim17: 依酒店突顯未解決的嚴重負擔（時效代理），用於升級治理。基準：良好 = 0個未結嚴重時效；不良 持續 > 3個案件。
imc_chart_notes.cim18: 跨酒店部門矩陣，用於快速基準對比與不均衡檢測。基準：良好 跨酒店差異平衡；不良 一個部門在多個酒店佔主導地位。

imc_chart_formulas.cim01: Level 1 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY hotel_code; Level 2 = TOP 10 COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY incident_item_name per hotel
imc_chart_formulas.cim03: VIP Incidents = COUNT(vip_code valid) GROUP BY hotel; VIP Closure % = VIP Completed / VIP Incidents * 100
imc_chart_formulas.cim04: Level 1 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY hotel_code; Level 2 = TOP 10 COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY incident_category per hotel
imc_chart_formulas.cim05: Repeat Rate % = repeat_count / total_cases * 100 per hotel
imc_chart_formulas.cim06: Country Value = SUM(total_cases) GROUP BY country_code; Label = CONCAT(hotel_code, incident_count) list per country
imc_chart_formulas.cim07: Level 1 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY hotel_code; Level 2 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY department per hotel
imc_chart_formulas.cim08: Level 1 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY hotel_code; Level 2 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY source_of_complaint per hotel
imc_chart_formulas.cim09: VIP = COUNT(vip_code valid); Non-VIP = total_cases - VIP; GROUP BY hotel_code
imc_chart_formulas.cim10: Level 1 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY hotel_code; Level 2 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY booking_source per hotel
imc_chart_formulas.cim13: X=COUNT(cases), Y=AVG(severity score), Bubble=VIP cases, Color=country/region
imc_chart_formulas.cim14: Regional KPI = AVG(metric by hotel in region); Regional Risk = aggregate of weighted KPI intensities
imc_chart_formulas.cim15: Department Risk Proxy = COUNT(cases) by hotel_code + department (or weighted severity where available)
imc_chart_formulas.cim17: Open Critical Aging Proxy = MIN(critical_cases, pending_cases) by hotel (aging date fallback when explicit age not present)
imc_chart_formulas.cim18: Matrix Cell = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY hotel_code, department

cmo_chart_notes.cmo-01: 外環顯示各酒店的MO總工單數。點擊酒店切片可檢視建立部門構成,再點擊部門可下鑽至其熱門缺陷。 Benchmark — Healthy: defects spread across departments; Warning: one department concentrates a disproportionate defect volume.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-02: 柱狀圖顯示各酒店的MO總工單數。點擊酒店可檢視賓客相關/非相關的分佈,再點擊切片可下鑽至其熱門缺陷。 Benchmark — Healthy: non-guest-related preventive work dominates; Warning: a hotel with a high guest-related defect share (guest-impacting maintenance risk).
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-03: 柱狀圖顯示各酒店的工單狀態構成;折線顯示各酒店的平均解決(完成)時間(小時)。 Benchmark — Healthy: high completed share with a stable/low average duration; Warning: a hotel where duration is climbing along with a growing open/pending stack.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-04: 外環顯示各酒店的MO工單總數。點擊酒店可檢視升級層級構成,再點擊層級可下鑽至其熱門缺陷。 Benchmark — Healthy: Level 0 dominates; Warning: a hotel with a growing share at Level 2+ concentrated in a few defects (systemic escalation risk).
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-05: 依酒店比較未結工單壓力。 Benchmark — Good: open rate ≤ 10%; Watch: 10–20%; Bad: > 20% (backlog pressure) at any hotel.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-06: 附酒店標籤的國家級地圖，用於連鎖範圍內的維修可見性。 Benchmark — Healthy: balanced regional load; Warning: a property or region with outsized maintenance demand.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-07: 依酒店比較賓客相關與非賓客相關的MO需求。 Benchmark — Healthy: guest-related share low chain-wide; Warning: a hotel with rising guest-related volume (complaint risk).
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-08: 各酒店間的平均嚴重度比較。 Benchmark — Good: average severity low and stable; Bad: a hotel with elevated average severity.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-09: Chain-wide distribution of work orders by resolution time. Click a bucket to see per-hotel breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: majority of orders in the < 1h–4h buckets chain-wide; Watch: a growing 8h+ share; Bad: a heavy 24h+ tail at any hotel.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-10: Chain-wide 24-hour work order distribution. Click an hour to see per-hotel breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: chain request peaks fall within staffed shifts; Warning: peaks in low-coverage hours at specific hotels.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-11: Top 10 defects with resolution > 24 hours across the chain. Click a bar to see per-hotel breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: count near zero; Watch: a few recurring defects; Bad: defects routinely breaching 24h at specific hotels (chronic failures).
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-12: 連鎖集團內最頻繁的維修資產或缺陷的樹狀圖。 Benchmark — Healthy: no single asset or defect dominates the chain; Warning: one tile much larger (chain-wide preventive-maintenance target).
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-13: 柱狀圖顯示各酒店的MO工單總數。點擊酒店可檢視類別構成,點擊類別可檢視熱門缺陷,再點擊缺陷可檢視其解決時間分佈。 Benchmark — Healthy: most defects resolve within the < 1h–4h buckets; Warning: an 8h+ or 24h+ tail concentrated in one category/defect (resourcing or parts-availability gap).
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-14: 柱狀圖顯示各酒店的MO工單總數。點擊酒店可檢視解決時間分佈,再點擊區間可下鑽至其熱門缺陷。 Benchmark — Healthy: majority of orders in the < 1h–4h buckets; Warning: a growing 24h+ share (process or resource bottleneck).
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-15: 柱狀圖顯示各酒店的MO工單總數。點擊酒店可檢視延誤(升級、超過期限)時間分佈,再點擊區間可下鑽至其熱門缺陷。 Benchmark — Healthy: few or no delayed orders; Warning: a growing 8h+/24h+ delayed share (SLA and escalation risk).
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-16: 柱狀圖顯示各酒店的MO工單總數。點擊酒店可檢視24小時分佈,再點擊時段可下鑽至其熱門缺陷。 Benchmark — Healthy: request peaks fall within staffed shifts; Warning: peaks in low-coverage hours (adjust on-call and shift cover).
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-17: 柱狀圖顯示各酒店的MO工單總數。點擊酒店可檢視樓層構成,再點擊樓層可下鑽至其熱門缺陷。 Benchmark — Healthy: defects spread evenly across floors; Warning: one floor concentrates a disproportionate defect volume (localized asset or infrastructure issue).
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-18: 柱狀圖顯示各酒店的MO工單總數。點擊酒店可檢視MO/PM類型構成,點擊類型可檢視建立部門構成,再點擊部門可下鑽至其熱門缺陷。 Benchmark — Healthy: PM (preventive) share is substantial relative to MO (reactive); Warning: MO heavily dominates PM (reactive-maintenance-driven operation).

cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-02: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then COUNT(*) BY guest_related, then TOP defect WITHIN guest_related WHERE type = MO

cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-04: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then COUNT(*) BY escalation_level, then TOP defect WITHIN escalation_level WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-05: open_orders / total_orders * 100 BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-06: Country Value = SUM(total_orders) GROUP BY country_code; Label = CONCAT(hotel_code, total_orders) list per country WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-07: COUNT(*) guest_related vs non_guest_related BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-08: AVG(severity_weight) BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-09: COUNT(*) BY duration_bucket WHERE type = MO DRILLDOWN COUNT(*) BY hotel_code WITHIN bucket
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-10: COUNT(*) BY HOUR(created_datetime) WHERE type = MO DRILLDOWN COUNT(*) BY hotel_code WITHIN hour

cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-13: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then COUNT(*) BY category, then TOP defect WITHIN category, then COUNT(*) BY resolution_duration_bucket WITHIN defect WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-14: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then COUNT(*) BY resolution_duration_bucket, then TOP defect WITHIN bucket WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-15: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then COUNT(*) BY delayed_duration_bucket, then TOP defect WITHIN bucket WHERE type = MO AND deadline_variance_minutes > 0
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-16: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then COUNT(*) BY HOUR(created_datetime), then TOP defect WITHIN hour WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-17: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then COUNT(*) BY floor, then TOP defect WITHIN floor WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-18: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then COUNT(*) BY type, then COUNT(*) BY created_by_department WITHIN type, then TOP defect WITHIN department WHERE type = MO OR type = PM
